channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Founders seize on Indian court ruling to revive criticism of Google’s ad business
item.description: The ruling drew support from founders, while lawyers said it could force platforms to revisit how they handle trademarked keywords.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for May 30, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for May 30, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for May 30, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1806 on May 30 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.
